name: Chinese Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating well.
3. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into the egg mixture, beating well.
4. Fold in the chopped dates and pecans.
5. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 35 minutes.
7. Cut into 3-inch by 1-inch bars.
8. Remove to a wire rack to cool.
9. Sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar before serving.
Yield: About 3 dozen cookie bars.
